Petition For Order Confirming The Second Trust Invalid Based On Fraud, Where First Trust Is Proper A
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Oliver Greenwood for Anthony Reimann. Gilbert Atencio in Propria Persona.

The Petition for Order Confirming The Second Trust Invalid Based on Fraud, etc. and the Motion to Disqualify Defendent's Attorney, etc. were taken off calendar. The matters will not be heard in this Court and are to be reset in Contra Costa County. Status of transfer to Contra Costa County was set for Ocotober 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Off Calendar Aug-15-2011 Continued To Sep-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming The Second Trust Invalid Based On Fraud, Where First Trust Is Proper A
Off Calendar Apr-12-2011 Continued To Aug-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Motion To Disqualify Defendants' Attorney, Robert Kosloff, For Conflict Of Interest From Handling Probate Code Section 850(A)(3) Proceeding
Off Calendar Apr-12-2011 Continued To Aug-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming The Second Trust Invalid Based On Fraud, Where First Trust Is Proper A
Off Calendar Jan-31-2011 Continued To Apr-12-11 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Kosloff for Anthony Reimann. Gilbert Atencio, Sr. in Propria Persona.

Mr. Atencio objects to Mr. Kosloff representing Mr. Reimann stating that there is a conflict of interest. The Court stated that the Proof of Service needs to be completed, that the notice of hearing identifying the petition differs from the caption of the petition itself, that any Beneficiary of the Trust needs to receive a copy of the petition and be listed on the Notice of Hearing, that the person identified to serve as Proposed Trustee has not filed a consent and that a copy of the Trust is needed. The matter was continued to April 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
